positive: Minimalist circular crest design featuring stylized celestial elements: a crescent moon cradling a constellation map of abstract stars, surrounded by delicate, flowing laurel branches and symmetrical geometric mandalas. The color palette should be deep midnight blue, antique gold, and creamy off-white. Use clean line art, highly detailed etching style, perfect symmetry, high contrast, vector-like quality, isolated on a transparent background, perfect for screen printing on apparel, centered composition.
